title: RSW Christmas Pet Cat 14" Cracker – Fun Festive Cat Toy Cracker with Playful Kitten Design – Includes Cat Bell Toy – Ideal for Cats and Pet Owners
features: FESTIVE CAT CRACKER – 14-inch Christmas cracker featuring a bright red design with paw prints, snowflakes, and a playful kitten illustration
CAT-FRIENDLY CONTENTS – Includes a bell toy to encourage play and exercise, keeping cats happy and engaged during the holidays
SAFE FOR PETS – Contains no loud noises or harmful contents, making it suitable for even the most sensitive pets
DECORATIVE PACKAGING – Presented in a printed box with an acetate window, ideal for display or treating a beloved cat
PERFECT STOCKING FILLER – A fun way to include your cat in the Christmas celebrations and create lasting festive memories
description: Celebrate Christmas with your feline friend with this adorable RSW Christmas Pet Cat 14" Cracker. Designed to bring festive cheer to both pets and owners, this cracker features a charming red design decorated with paw prints, snowflakes, and a playful kitten illustration wearing a Santa hat. It’s the perfect way to make cats part of your holiday celebrations and looks great on the Christmas table or under the tree. Each cracker contains a cat bell toy to encourage play and keep your pet entertained during the festive season. The durable bell toy is perfect for batting, chasing, and stimulating your cat’s natural hunting instincts. The cracker is presented in a decorative printed box with an acetate window, making it a lovely addition to your seasonal décor. This cat-friendly cracker is completely safe, containing no loud noises or harmful contents, so your pet can enjoy the excitement of Christmas without stress. Once used, the packaging can be recycled, allowing you to celebrate in a more sustainable way while including your cat in family traditions. WARNING! DO NOT PULL INNER OUTSIDE PARTY CRACKER. PULL CRACKER AWAY FROM FACE. DO NOT PULL NEAR EYES OR EARS. PULL BOTH ENDS AT ARMS LENGTH FIRMLY AND SHARPLY. DO NOT REMOVE INNER. WARNING! Not suitable for children under 3 years due to small parts which could represent a choking hazard. Contents may include glass and items with functional sharp points or edges. Adult supervision is required. Items may fall from crackers whilst pulling.
